headline: Assessing Pool Corp (POOL) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Why Pool (POOL) is back on investors’ radar Pool (POOL) is drawing fresh attention after recent trading left the shares about 24% lower over the past month and roughly 14% lower over the past 3 months, prompting closer scrutiny of its current valuation. See our latest analysis for Pool. Looking beyond the recent pullback, Pool’s 1 day share price return of 1.23% contrasts with a 30 day share price return decline of 23.88% and a 1 year total shareholder return decline of 35.66%. This suggests...
